headline: MONSTER BEVERAGE CORP (NASDAQ:MNST) Combines Strong Growth Fundamentals with a Bull Flag Technical SetuP
summary: Discover Monster Beverage (MNST) as a strong growth stock with a perfect technical setup. Combining 30% EPS growth, zero debt, and a bull flag pattern, this dual-strategy screen identifies stocks with solid fundamentals and timely breakout potential.
